connection.custom-script:
echo Connecting...
 $GDBTargetCommand$ echo Connected!!
 echo *********************************
 echo Loading NonSecure file...
 exec-file NonSecure/build/clion-2026.1-stm32l5-trustzone_NS.elf echo Flashing... load echo *********************************
 echo Loading Secure file...
 file Secure/build/clion-2026.1-stm32l5-trustzone_S.elf echo Flashing...
 load
echo *********************************
 echo Loading NonSecure symbols file...
 add-symbol-file NonSecure/build/clion-2026.1-stm32l5-trustzone_NS.elf
echo *********************************
 echo Reset
 monitor reset
